result.stdout:
lumos v0.1.0

USAGE
  dotnet lumos.dll [options]
  dotnet lumos.dll [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  start             

You can run `dotnet lumos.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
lumos v0.1.0

USAGE
  dotnet lumos.dll start [options]

OPTIONS
  -o|--output       The output filename Default: "telemetry.json".
  -f|--format       The output format Choices: "Speedscope". Default: "Speedscope".
  -m|--mode         The input mode Choices: "Manual", "Automatic". Default: "Automatic".
  -p|--port         The port to start listen on. Default 15000 Default: "15000".
  --verbose         Enable verbose logging. Default is false Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

lumos v0.1.0

USAGE
  dotnet lumos.dll start [options]

OPTIONS
  -o|--output       The output filename Default: "telemetry.json".
  -f|--format       The output format Choices: "Speedscope". Default: "Speedscope".
  -m|--mode         The input mode Choices: "Manual", "Automatic". Default: "Automatic".
  -p|--port         The port to start listen on. Default 15000 Default: "15000".
  --verbose         Enable verbose logging. Default is false Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
